title: Ideaspace Note frontmatter (Layer 1)
description: The portable, author-owned frontmatter of a knowledge Note — what travels in the file (subject), as opposed to provenance (git) and platform identity (the map). PROVISIONAL, internal use, v0.1; public timing undecided. Per the spec, an absent field is a drift signal, not an error — nothing is strictly required. Additional fields are allowed so the leaf stays extensible.

summary.description: What this is about, compressed. Orients a reader without querying anything.

attached_to.description: A SINGLE typed link to the entity this Note is about (subject, not provenance), written `<type>:<id>`. One value by design — the inverse fan-in (a thing having many Notes) is the platform's job, not the file's. The type namespace is PLATFORM-DEFINED and open, like the underscore extension point: the protocol fixes only the `<type>:<id>` shape; a platform declares which types it resolves.

tags.description: Flat classifiers within the directory model.

x-status: provisional — internal use; public timing undecided
x-notes: Subject rides in frontmatter (this schema); provenance (author, co-author, Change-Id) rides in git; internal platform handles ride in the platform's map, never the file.
Other fields are permitted via additionalProperties but are not standardized here.
The attached_to type namespace is platform-defined: the protocol fixes the `<type>:<id>` shape only. x-platform-type-examples lists illustrative types; each platform declares the ones it resolves.
